◎简　　介  

　　外星闯入者哈里·范德斯佩格尔和麦卡利斯特将军搁置分歧，共同面对更大的生存威胁——即将到来的灰人入侵。Extraterrestrial interloper Harry Vanderspeigle and General McCallister put aside their differences and work together in the face of a much greater existential threat - the impending invasion of the Greys.
